rulings.Rulings: continued to january 30, 2019. none of the documents necessary to complete the review are available due to the age of this case. in addition, no inventory and appraisal has been filed and property cannot be distributed until the I & A is properly prepared by the probate referee (see SFLR 14.45 for appointment of a referee at this stage in the proceedings). Finally, a new order is required that has all of the property in the body of the order. attachemnts and exhibits to the order for final distribution are not allowed.
